rows.label: qev051509_MSG0001
rows.name:
Impressive, [ST:playername ].
You've grown incomparably stronger since we last fought.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051509_MSG0002
rows.name:
Yes... With that power,
you magnificently struck down Luxaar...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051509_MSG0003
rows.name:
I truly thank you.
For avenging my brothers.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051509_MSG0004
rows.name:
I heard that a peerless warrior who has won numerous
Lars Martial Arts Tournaments is participating in this one.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev051509_MSG0005
rows.name:
Don't you dare lose!
Make sure to prove that you are the strongest.[ST:wait ]
